titleStmt.title: SII 23.580: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 580. (A.R. No. 580 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 5th tier of the north base, the north and west walls of the same maṇḍapa and the north wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḷa III year 13: 1257-58 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription is also dated in Saka 1179, Piṅgala, Mēsha-Saṅkrānti. It is written in three languages, the first part being in Sanskrit; the next comprising mostly of the names of the donees with the number of their shares of land, is in Telugu but in Grantha alphabet like the first part; and the last portion of about 20 lines, giving the main gist of the record is in Tamil. The epigraph begins with a eulogy of a king by name Triṇētra (Trilōchana-Pallava ?) who founded many agrahāras to the east of the Tripurāntaka hill. A successor of his of the same name-Mukkaṇṭi-Kāḍuveṭṭi established and gave the village Peruṅgaṇḍūr in Paśchima-Pāka-nāḍu a division of Adhirājendra-Chōḷa-maṇḍalam to 52 Brāhmaṇas in Saka 723 (mistake for Śaka 730 ?), Sarvadhāri, Mēsha-Saṅkramaṇa, ba. 6, Wednesday, Mūlā (A.D. 808, March 21, Tuesday ?). The donees were in enjoyment of their shares for a long time, when some Velumas from Inumbrōlu escaping from the māri-jvaram of their place, settled in fields near them, agreeing to pay rents for their lands, alongside the residents of Sakali-Kōḍūra who had also emigrated from their place on account of some riots. During a famine that followed the Brāhmaṇas left their places and when they returned found themselves supplanted in their possessions by the new comers who had in the meantime named their new settlement as Kōḍūru, and refused to give the rent due to the Brāhmaṇa landlords. The latter then made a representation to the chief Manumasiddhi, whose genealogy is here introduced viz Dāyabhīma, Bētabhūpa, Eṟasiddhi, Manmasiddha, and Tikkanṛipa the father of the ruling chief. This Manumasiddhi is said to have conquered a chief named Vijaya and tried to secure the friendship of Kākatīya-Gaṇapati by fighting a battle for him on the banks of the Gōdāvari. He was a feudatory under the Chōḷa king Rājēndra-Chōḷa III whose regnal year is quoted.

Manumasiddhi sent for the cultivators against whom the complaint was made and after due enquiry with witnesses, decided the case in favour of the dispossessed Brāhmaṇas, to whom he renewed the grant of the village Kōḍūru for the merit of his father. Then follows a detailed list of all the share-holders, in Telugu. The concluding portion of the inscription which is in Tamil registers an order of Madurāntaka-Pottappi-Chōḷa Manumasiddhi, granting the village Kōḍūru a hamlet of Peruṅgaṇḍūr to the Brāhmaṇas, thus restoring their ancient possessions, when the inhabitants from Inumbuḍōl (Inumbrōlu) could not prove their case.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: svasti . lakṣmī kaustubha śītāmśu gaurī sahacaram mahaḥ brāhmaṇānām gavāñcaiva jāgartti svasti karmmaṇi . nētratrayēṇa sabhayastrīpurāntakasya nētrādajāyata jagattraya hṛttṛ tīyāt nāmnā triṇētraiti sa tripurā ntakādrēḥprācyāndiśi vyadhita saptaśatāgrahārān Āsthāni maṇimaṇṭapa ñjayavatēṣvarajñaḥkēbibhūḥ kīrttērjja nmāgraham parākramasarit purasya mēghōdayaḥ vēlāvairicamū taraṅga puṣa

tasyakṣma laya saṅgīpaṇāvānasiḥ jātē yamuniśatēṣuca vimśatauca paścāttrayēca śaradāmapi sarvadhāri saṅvatsarē bahulapakṣa ṣaṣṭyupētē vārē budhē śaśinisaṅgini mūlagēna bhānōśca mēṣavarasamkra maṇē dinē sthitē Adhirājēndracōḷamaṇḍalē paścimapāka �

yē jayamkōṇṭacōḷacaturvēdi maṅgalākhyam kṛtvā vērukaṇthūra mimaṅ grāmam catussimāyuktandaṇḍāya śulkasahitañca pañcāśatē dvijanmabhyō dvābhyāñca nṛṛpapuṅgavaḥ prādākiṇēttrisadṛśa striṇētrassōyamiśvaraḥ tamēnamupap

vam prāśamayat kaścinnṛpaḥ kīdṛśaḥ kadā kathamiti-śrīkāntasya jagatpatē ssamudabhū nnābhīsarōjanmani brahmā tasya marīci rasyaca jagajjyāyān sutaḥ kaśyapaḥ Ē stasya manustatōma rikṣvākutaḥ prakhyātaścakakutsthaitya pautram kavēvāgamṛtasyayaḥ Uttamō nāyakastasyāvamśē daśa rathādabhūt prabhāti kālē mahati kalikālaḥ kalauyugē kāvēryyāssaritaḥ karttā tatkulē samajāyata tasyānvavāyē mahati bijjaṇō nāma sajjanaḥ śūraśśauryyavatām

—pōbhavat dāyabhīmastatō jajñē bētabhūpastatōbhavat bētabhūpāda bhūdērasiddha ssiddhimatām varaḥ tasmādajani rājēndrō manmasiddhamahīpatiḥ yaśaḥ pāṇḍaritāśēṣadigantasthāsitā satām tasyā bhūttanaya ssamastajagatī dāmpatya sampattimā ṅēvastikkanṛpaḥ parājitamasavṛtya ruṣapōṣōdayaḥ yaddōrvikrama vastavistṛtakathāgāthā kṣarālamkṛtamhastē pustakamambūjāsanavadhū rddhattēdya vidyārtthinī kāñcīm vikramasimhanāmanagarī nāthaḥ praśāsat balāccam pāyām puridōrbalādyudhi śaraissōmēśvaram pīḍayan karnnāṭapramadāvilō canabhavaiścakrē bhavērātmajā ntōyaiḥ kajjaḷakābikarālubitaissadyaḥ kaḷa tmajām-tasmādajāyata jagattraya—

—yamaulimālālōlābijālaparicāritapādapīṭhaḥ yasmāt parājitimatānvitajayēna rājñā bhītyā tvavāhibahuyōjana sammitō ddhvāmārggistathā manunarēśvaracōdi taśca samcōdyamāna hṛdayō jijīviṣābhiḥ yassāhāyyam vidhitsurggaṇapati nṛpatē ssvēcphayā saṅgaragrē gōdāvaryyām sariti nṛpatiñcamūyaṣṭyā nivṛtya kāliṅgam svā liṅgānabhimukhamakarō dēkavira stadānīntaṭhēstha kasmaicidasmai jagati narapati sthiṣṭhatē saṅgarāgrē Asmin vikramasimhākhyē nagarē [yām praśāsati manmasidyābhidhē raājiñjanayajyāyasi tējasā-pēnuṅgapuri catusimmanuka mōdalu tūrpuna kōṇḍūri
-na puṭṭadini dēkṣaṇāna Īyūri pasthalaku tūrpukōṇḍalakupōṅga drōvam Īvaṭṭa dēkṣaṇāna vikkalamaḍamaḍa paḍumaṭa vēdurugumi Agnēyamuna Iṇḍūrikini yūrikini Ēl
ī vēdurugumi paḍamaṭayuta Udaka pāti kaṛāyaṛāti nairirṛti mārēḷḷakuṇṭa kuṇṭa paḍumaṭa bōl
niguṇṭa Īdakṣi ṇāna siṅgamālakunu Ī yūriki Ēl
kuṇapaḍumaṭa kambālaguṇṭa guṇṭa paḍumaṭa cukṣīśvaradēvaraguḍi guḍi Uttarāna cē
vulōni maddi dōrapu paḍumaṭa siddāpurānakunu Īyūriki Ē
la Ī dōrapu Uttarānarāṣannayiruti Uttarāna kēdāradēvariguḍi Uttarāna pāti nayiruti paḍumaṭa mūṅka māmiḷḷu māmiḷḷa U—
maṅgalidōrapu dēkṣaṇāna Indapakhipādamulu kōlanu kōlanu Ēḍu kōlalu viḍucina pakkapakkitūrpunaguṇṭa dōrapu dōrapu Āgnēyamuna guñjinikaṇḍaḷa
Īyūri pasulaku kurukōṇḍa lakupōṅgadrōva Īśānyamunagunu prōlikini Īyūrikini Ēl
Īka ṇḍayē dakṣiṇāna guñjani paḍumaṭi dharamuku na

mma Āgnēyamu na pāṣāṇa pañci Āgnēyamuna vēdurugumi Idi Īyūri catussimānamukaṇṭi kāḍuvēṭṭindra viḍicinanu Īyūri Ēbhavirēṇḍu vṛttilunu Ībhaṅga pēddakālamu Anubhaviñcucunuṇḍaṅgānu sakalikōḍurivāru tamadēśamu kalahamayina vala savaccicē

—tambhukōvinanu Inumprōli vēlumalu tama Ūru mārijvaramu Ayina māku Ayēdaṭa niluvarādu Ēmu Īgaḍusalalōm kāpu Uṇḍi mikṣētra muḍuna mīku Arikoru vēṭṭi Uṇḍadamani Arikōru pēruvānuṇḍaṅgāna Antakuminaśanikṣāmmuna niluvarāka dēśāndramu pōyinanu kōḍūra ni pēru pēṭṭikōni Uṇḍaṅgānu Ēmu kṣāmam tēliyaṅgāvicci mākṣētramu Ēmpadi Arikōrupēṭṭumanna pēṭṭaka māsāsanahinamavaṭa Ēṛṅgi rācādhinamu sēsi cārika Arikōru paṭṭakōni Uṇḍaṅgānu manumasiddhirājanaku Ēmu Ī paṭṭāṅgu vinnapamu cēsina rājuna Avadharimci Inabrōli vēlumala piluvampanni pākanāṭi bhūmivārini Ōddapēṭṭikōnipra—

—ma kṣētramu Avunaṭṭukānu maḍḍapaṭṭadamaniyada rūmirupiri paṭṭiñca ri Anaṅgānu rājuna bhūmivārun Idi brāhmala kṣētramu Avu nani nirnayiñcī śakābamula vēyinūṭi Ēḍuva tōmmidi pēṭṭana virarājēndracōḷa dēvaniki pammaḍavaga śrāhi Ayina piṅgala samvatsaram mēṣasam krānti taṇḍri tirukāḷadēva mahārājulaku dharmmavukāna Ī prāpa Ayina kōḍūru dhāravōsi Iccī sāsanamu Iccī māku pūrvamu vṛttulu Ēbhavirēṇṭu lōna danu Ākālamu
ri samudāya mukkam krayamu kōnna vṛttulu śrīvatsagōtramu kuṇḍi dāmōdara bhaṭṭacēta krayamu kōntabhāgamu Ōkkaṭini—
—kagōtramu nārāyaṇa Appayacētakrayamu kō kṛmikandanāricētam krayamu kōnnabhāgamu Ōkaṭiku Ī nāluku bhāgamuluku U dravyamu valasi
Upāyamu kāla Ucitamayinamūlyamunaku Ammina bhāgamulu muppaviā
nu pūrvavṛttulu nālupavi Ēnumidini Iṭṭuka barasi Ēnambhavi nālugu cēsigṛhakṣētramulu Ōkkabhaṅgicēsi Uṇḍyapayiccīkōni Anubhavi—

—bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi kōṇḍēri sarvaṇa tyabhaṭṭa bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi mugagaṇasōmiśvarabhaṭṭa bhugamulu rēṇḍu cōkkabhaṭṭa bhāgamu ṇama bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi māriya śrī dharapēddi bhāgamulu rēṇḍu mārē ṣaḍaṅgara bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi cinnēri nārāyaṇa pēddi bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi vērē
mu Ōkkaṭi pēmmanamañci bhāgam rundhatma vēntayabha
bhāgam Ara-mārayakamacci bhāgamu kālu pālaya kōṇṭani
ḍamannaya bhaṭṭubhāgamu Ara-gajjula bhāskara dēvani bhāgamu Ō
kaṭi nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa sōmiśvara Appayabhāgamu Ara-ca
ṇayabhaṭṭu vēnnayapēddi bhāgamu kālu Ādityabhaṭṭu Īśva
yaṇa Appaya bhāgamu kālu-kōṇḍapēddi bhāgamu kālu-kō
bhaṭṭu bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi-āditya caturvēdula bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi vi
mu Ōkakaṭi-kamugula sōmiśvarabhaṭṭu bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi paramātma
pēddi samkiśvarappēddi bhāgamu Ara-aṇṇama narasimha kūcci
bhāgamu Ara-kēśavamañci nārāyaṇani bhāgamukālu Aṇṇama Apva
ya bhāgamu Ara-tripurayapēddi Ādityani bhāgamukālu-pālaya A
ppanappēddi bhāgamu kālu-varakuccī pālayabhaṭṭa bhāgamu kālu-ja
madagni vatsagōtram kāmaṇamu Adityappēddi bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi-ku

div.p:
mādhavapēddi kēśavani bhāgamukālu sa
rvatitthala pinnapāla bhāgamu Ara siva
ṇabhaṭṭumārayabhāgamu kālu Orala pē
vabhaṭṭu bhāgamulu-mūṇḍru caturmukhabha
ṭṭu Allāḷapēddi bhāgamu mukkālu- kumaraya
ppanabhāgamu Ara-sōmiśvara Appaya bhāga
mu Ara-prōlayamañci bhāgamu kālu-āditya kṛ
ccibhāgamu kālu-allāḷabhaṭṭa keśapapēddi bhā
gamu kālu prōlaya bhaṭṭu subbaṇappēddi bhāga
mu Ōkkaṭi bhāradvāja gōtram janārddana bhaṭṭa bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi
prōlayappēddi kōṭukulu bhāgamu Ōkaṭi Āgirasa
gōtram brahmadēvabhaṭṭubhāgamu Ōkkaṭi śrīmadhurāntaka
kuppila tirunāpuṭai Āḻvārāna sēṣajanya cūḍā
maṇi bhāgam Añcu-kapigōtram jaṟapālaya bhaṭṭa
bhāgam kālu-śrīrāmmañci kōḍukkula bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi
kāśyapagōtram dāmōdarabhaṭṭu bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi Āṇḍidō
ṇaya bhaṭṭubhāgamu Ōkkaṭi Appaṇasōmēdula bhāgamalu rē
ṇṭu- gajjumkāmāṇḍibhaṭṭu bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi-punnamēri pālaya
bhaṭṭubhāgamu Ōkkaṭi pēdda prōlaya bhaṭṭu bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi pālaya
mañci trivikramabhaṭṭubhāgamu Ara-pōttē bhaṭṭu prōlēya Appaya
bhāgamu mākāṇa- Ātraya gōtram dōṇaya bhaṭṭu bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi
kandaṇa kramitai bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi-kandarpa kēśavappēddi bhāgamu kālu
mādhava śri rāmappēddi bhāgamu kālu lōhita gōtram pō
nnamku cēluvē bhāgamu Ōkkaṭi-gautama gōtram hē

p.seg: vitta Itu nāṉum nāṭavarum kūṭa Ārāyntu
p.hi: tān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rā
dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutam padam . svadattām para
dattām vā yō harēta vasundharām ṣaṣṭim varṣasahasrāṇi vi
p.seg: ṣayattārom yāṇṭu patumuṉṟu Ivaiccāl vanta vari Iru

div.p: Digital edition of SII 23.580 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
